items.text: GCAS_singleton.impl shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.text: GCAS_singleton.impl shall define constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0

items.text: GCAS_singleton.impl shall invoke kinematicLinearization function from gcas_nodes library with parameter t to compute height

items.text: GCAS_singleton shall set output port timeToRecovery to constant 3.7

items.text: When simulation time t >= recovery time, computed height must always be > minHeightAllowed

items.text: When simulation time t >= recovery time, current height must be > previous height to indicate pull-up trend
